cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)

## astronomy.
add_library(astronomy_static STATIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/astronomy/source/c/astronomy.c)
set_target_properties(astronomy_static PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/astronomy/source/c/libastronomy.a)
set_target_properties(astronomy_static PROPERTIES INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/astronomy/source/c)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC astronomy_static)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC astronomy_static)

add_library(bcrypt_static STATIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libbcrypt/bcrypt.c)
set_target_properties(bcrypt_static PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libbcrypt/bcrypt.a)
set_target_properties(bcrypt_static PROPERTIES INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/libbcrypt)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC bcrypt_static)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC bcrypt_static)

add_subdirectory(centijson)
add_subdirectory(enet6)
add_subdirectory(libnatpmp)
add_subdirectory(miniupnp/miniupnpc)

target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC enet6)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC enet6)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC natpmp)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC natpmp)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC miniupnpc)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC miniupnpc)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC OpenAL::OpenAL)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC OpenAL::OpenAL)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC CURL::libcurl)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC CURL::libcurl)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC ${LUA_LIBRARIES})
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC ${LUA_LIBRARIES})

## centitoml.
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC json)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC json)
add_library(centitoml OBJECT "centitoml/toml_api.c")
target_link_libraries(centitoml PUBLIC json)
target_include_directories(centitoml INTERFACE "centitoml")

target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC centitoml)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC centitoml)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC spng)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC spng)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC enet)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC enet)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC bcrypt_static avcodec avformat avutil swresample)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC bcrypt_static avcodec avformat avutil swresample)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC minizip)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC minizip)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx PUBLIC ZLIB::ZLIB)
target_link_libraries(keeperfx_hvlog PUBLIC ZLIB::ZLIB)
